programs.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA
programs.desc: American competitive cookery series. It's the quarterfinals as the remaining entrepreneurs must provide a full breakfast at Gordon's Savoy Grill.

programs.desc: Stripper Darren hopes to be impressed by the style choices of three potential suitors, Loren, Trudian and Brooke.

programs.desc: With only eight weeks until the birth of their second baby, Love Island power couple Olivia and Alex Bowen juggle the love, loss and laughter of modern parenting.

programs.title: The Only Way is Essex
programs.desc: Kady's efforts at playing Cupid with Diags and childhood friend Jodie don't go to plan. Essex's most eligible bachelor Sam Mucklow seems to have a quandary on his hands.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programs.desc: US reality series. Jen returns from pretrial meetings in New York with unexpected news as Heather hosts a ski day reunion that soon goes badly wrong.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programs.desc: US reality series. Melissa and Teresa prepare to send their daughters to college, and Rachel throws a surprise party where tensions flare over John Fuda.
